div1.entryFree: Scab, the incrustation formed over sores by dried matter; applied to persons as a term of extreme contempt and disgust: my elbow itched: I thought there would a s. follow, Ado III, 3, 107. out, s. Tw. II, 5, 82. well said, i' faith, Wart; thou'rt a good s. H4B III, 2, 296. the loathsomest s. in Greece, Troil. II, 1, 31. that, rubbing the poor itch of your opinion, make yourselves --s, Cor. I, 1, 169.
